name: Anthro Gengar
description:
👻"I've given a wedgie to the mayor, y'know? Funniest thing I've ever done."👻

Ghastly prankster who likes taking things to the extreme.

As per usual, feel free to leave reviews or public chats to help me improve my bots (or if you just want to raise my serotonin levels).

Art by Dewbber. I love this artist so much. He draws large gals, but in a rather cute way as well.
creator: Eggscellent
